tools.name: create_form
tools.description: Create a voice-first form link that collects human answers and pipes responses back to the agent.

tools.name: create_feedback_form
tools.description: Create a voice-first feedback, cancellation, feature request, survey, or research form with optional smart follow-ups.

tools.name: create_ask
tools.description: Create a voice-first Superforms answer link for human input. Backward-compatible alias for create_form.

tools.name: join_creation_session
tools.description: Join a Superforms homepage creation handoff session before creating the real form. Pass agentName with the client name, such as Codex, Claude Code, Claude, ChatGPT, or Cursor.

tools.name: update_creation_session
tools.description: Update a homepage creation handoff draft with the current form title, questions, and settings before the user clicks Set live.

tools.name: get_responses
tools.description: Fetch persisted raw responses for a Superforms ask. This is the MCP equivalent of the HTTP bridge answers endpoint.

tools.name: list_asks
tools.description: List recent asks for a provided private agent token.

tools.name: watch_ask
tools.description: Wait briefly for a response, including responses received while an agent was reconnecting. Use since for durable catch-up; the HTTP bridge also exposes an SSE stream endpoint.
